summary: Employee Portal redesign verified. All features working correctly: David Chen (declined employee) can login, view redesigned portal with dark green hero banner, profile details, decline info card, and download 1095-C PDF. Employer login and Dashboard/IRS Forms pages also verified working.

issues: Missing data-testid='profile-card' on the Profile Details card (has PROFILE DETAILS text but no testid)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans - Returns declined enrollment with offer_code 1A
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-1095c/pdf - Returns valid PDF (200, application/pdf)
Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1095c/{employer_id}/2026 - Returns 2 forms for offered employees
Frontend: Employee Portal renders with new design (dark green hero #1C3B35)
Frontend: data-testid='decline-info-card' present (shows Coverage Declined, Spouse Coverage)
Frontend: Download 1095-C button works - downloads PDF (1095-C_David_chen_2026.pdf)
Frontend: Employer Dashboard loads correctly (60 employees, 47 FT, 57.25 FTE, ALE status)
Frontend: IRS Forms page loads (shows 2 1095-C forms for offered employees)
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeePortalPage.js correctly implements new design with sage/forest green (#1C3B35) color palette
All required data-testid attributes present: employee-portal-page, enrollment-status-badge, decline-info-card, form-1095c-card, download-1095c-btn
Design uses rounded-2xl cards, Manrope/Work Sans fonts as specified
1095-C download functionality works correctly for declined employees with coverage offers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal redesign verified. Key points: (1) Dark green hero banner (#1C3B35) working. (2) All 5 required data-testid attributes present. (3) David Chen shows as declined with offer_code 1A and can download 1095-C. (4) Employer dashboard and IRS Forms pages working. (5) Design uses rounded-2xl cards, Manrope/Work Sans fonts.
